articles.title: Iraq and Congo are the last two to qualify for the World Cup after last night's playoffs
articles.summary: (ANSA) - ROME, APRIL 01 - Iraq and Congo are the last two qualifiers for the football World Cup scheduled for June in North America. In the intercontinental play-offs played overnight in Mexico they beat Bolivia and Congo respectively.
